title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 116.195 - Costs of court-ordered ballot title change to be paid by the state
text:
116.195.  Costs of court-ordered ballot title change to be paid by the state. — Whenever the reprinting of a statewide ballot measure is necessary as a result of a court-ordered change to the ballot language for such measure, the costs of such reprinting shall be paid by the state.
(L. 1999 H.B. 676 § 2)
